productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Solid DK.Grey Trousers
description: CompositionGrey formal trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures and brand badge above the right pocket, loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, and a zipper and button closureFittingMidrise Narrow bottomWash careNormal machine wash with warm waterWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry in shadeMedium heat steam iron iron: Do not iron on decorationsCrafted from 100% cotton, this pair of chinos from the arrow sport collection is lightweight and comfortable. The fine tailoring ensures an excellent Fit, offering a flattering silhouette and making it a great addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 41.5"Height: 6.1 Waist: 31"
